text_original: this app is good and time only not enough for one day may be can try two days for free
text_zh: 这个应用很好，只是给的一天时间不够，也许可以尝试免费给两天。
reply_original: Hi! We are thrilled to hear you are enjoying Fantasia. Regarding your suggestion for a longer free trial, I have shared this directly with our Product Team for review. It is passionate users like you who help us grow! If you have more ideas or need help, please reach out to support@fantachat.ai. Thanks for being awesome!
reply_zh: 嗨！很高兴听到你喜欢 Fantasia。关于你提出的延长免费试用期的建议，我已经直接反馈给我们的产品团队进行评估。正是像你这样充满热情的用户在帮助我们成长！如果你有更多想法或需要帮助，请联系 support@fantachat.ai。感谢你的支持！
